name: FinTV
description: FinTV turns your Jellyfin library into always-on broadcast channels with 30-minute lineup grids, smart scheduling, commercial breaks, channel logos, WeatherStar weather channel, and M3U/XMLTV Live TV integration.
overview: Simulated live TV channels with lineups, commercials, and IPTV streaming

versions.changelog:
- Target Jellyfin 12.0 (.NET 10); required for Jellyfin 12.0 RC and later
- Stop bundling Microsoft.Extensions.* assemblies that conflict with Jellyfin host DI types

- Stop bundling Microsoft.Extensions.* assemblies that conflict with Jellyfin host DI types
- Whitelist managed assemblies in meta.json so Jellyfin does not load native SQLite binaries as .NET assemblies

- Whitelist managed assemblies in meta.json so Jellyfin does not load native SQLite binaries as .NET assemblies
- Fix plugin packaging to include dependency assemblies required at runtime
- Fix plugin packaging to include dependency assemblies required at runtime
